visualizerParams.title: Caesar Decryption Shift Bug
visualizerParams.problemDescription: The brute force Caesar decryption is producing incorrect shifts. It seems the direction of the shift or the modulo arithmetic for wrap-around is flawed. Find and fix the error.

solution.explanation: To decrypt a Caesar cipher, we must shift characters BACKWARDS (subtract the key). The buggy code used `+ key`, which effectively re-encrypted or shifted in the wrong direction. Using `- key` with modulo 26 correctly handles the wrap-around from 'A' back to 'Z'.
